name: constipation
title: best herbal teas for constipation
description: Cnidium officinale tea contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and volatile oils, which possess laxative properties that help to treat constipation. These compounds enhance gut motility, improve bowel function, and increase the secretion of digestive enzymes, thereby promoting regular bowel movements.
